VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper exists with the exact title and matching authors (Ashish Goel, Sudipto Guha, Kamesh Munagala), published at PODS 2006 (the 25th ACM SIGMOD-SIGACT-SIGART symposium on Principles of Database Systems). It is indexed on DBLP and the full PDF is available at Stanford.
LINK: https://dblp.uni-trier.de/rec/conf/pods/GoelGM06.xml
